commands.observed: RUN: plan-002-tests: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'pytest', 'tests/chronos/forkpoints', '-q', '-m', 'not integration']; 12 passed, 1 deselected in 0.03s

RUN: integration-forkpoint: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'pytest', 'tests/chronos/forkpoints', '-q', '-m', 'integration']; 1 passed, 12 deselected in 133.66s. Regenerated the accepted-trace retained-handle ForkPoint fp-826ba545cf30870e67d42ddb with Modal Filesystem Snapshot im-01KVKYBWZYVZSD79CX5P9SNPXR, content digest ea2ff75ff7f5702cb17f8e047e35e96bad4db16083343e38951d9c5bf7829613, Dockerfile-backed HUD env image contents, clean MongoDB quiesce/restart, real restore/grader execution, negative restore checks, and restored-sandbox security/surface inventory.

checks.name: Plan 002 command routing
checks.evidence: docs/plans/repo-map/COMMANDS.json now maps plan-002-tests and integration-forkpoint to verified pytest argv with PYTHONPATH=src under a narrow documented ownership exception.

checks.name: Six behavior cases
checks.evidence: tests/chronos/forkpoints/test_core.py covers valid capture, valid restore, boundary mismatch, history mismatch, grader mismatch, unsupported mode, partial cleanup, finalized-record immutability, store-verified capture return values, tamper rejection, and environment source-digest coverage against the repo-native contract with a deterministic local provider.

checks.name: Integration readiness
checks.evidence: tests/chronos/forkpoints/test_integration_readiness.py runs chronos.forkpoints.integration_probe, which exports the accepted HUD trace into a redacted boundary summary, runs a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over /app, /data/db, and /var/log/mongodb.log markers, replays accepted trace tool calls, creates/restores an orchestrated live-boundary ForkPoint through the repo-native contract, persists docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/forkpoint-record.json, and writes docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/integration-readiness.json.

checks.name: Real HUD/Modal ForkPoint completion
checks.evidence: Accepted for Plan 002 completion: docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/live-boundary-forkpoint.json records an orchestrated accepted-trace rerun with a retained Modal sandbox handle, ForkPoint fp-826ba545cf30870e67d42ddb, Filesystem Snapshot im-01KVKYBWZYVZSD79CX5P9SNPXR, real restore/grader execution, negative restore checks, and restored-sandbox security/surface inventory. Provider access to the already-finished historical sandbox remains unavailable, so the retained-handle rerun is the canonical branch-ready ForkPoint consumed by Plan 003.

checks.name: Orchestrated live-boundary ForkPoint
checks.evidence: docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/live-boundary-forkpoint.json records ForkPoint fp-826ba545cf30870e67d42ddb, Modal Filesystem Snapshot im-01KVKYBWZYVZSD79CX5P9SNPXR, boundary token/history hash, combined image digest forkpoint-image-sha256:dc11b737edf6fe985d7698754a6e218fb39bc383f2bc5edbd3f3a7a51ff295d6, MongoDB fsync plus clean shutdown quiescence, query hash equality after restore, grader-output hash after restore, and block_network/no-secrets/resource labels with /root/.env, Docker socket, and metadata network negative probes. It also records writable/import surface inventory with allowlisted Python environment keys and boundary, history, grader, and unsupported-mode restore rejections with no provider restore fallback. docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/forkpoint-record.json persists the immutable ForkPoint record with content digest ea2ff75ff7f5702cb17f8e047e35e96bad4db16083343e38951d9c5bf7829613.

checks.name: Environment source digest coverage
checks.evidence: tests/chronos/forkpoints/test_core.py verifies environment_source_digest changes when envs/mongodb-sales-aggregation-engine/task_assets/reference_solution.sh changes. docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/image-identity.json records corrected source digest source-tree-sha256:5a5ff1aeca8f4600cb0d890ecc012a9510873ca3c4780b0f17575ff684775a49 and corrected combined image identity forkpoint-image-sha256:dc11b737edf6fe985d7698754a6e218fb39bc383f2bc5edbd3f3a7a51ff295d6 from a live integration rerun.

checks.name: Sealed ForkPoint return value
checks.evidence: capture_forkpoint now returns the store-verified finalized record, including content_digest. tests/chronos/forkpoints/test_core.py verifies the returned record equals ForkPointStore.get(...) and that tampering with the finalized JSON record is rejected before restore.

artifacts.description: In-progress Plan 002 evidence manifest recording exact Done-when command observations, real Modal/HUD evidence, retained-handle ForkPoint artifacts, and remaining STOP conditions.
Living-doc log updated with Plan 002 progress, surprises, decisions, outcomes, best-practice fix discussion, and remaining STOP conditions.
Plan 002 ForkPoint capture/restore contract, immutable JSON store, deterministic local snapshot provider, and integration-readiness command.
Behavior tests and integration-readiness test for the Plan 002 ForkPoint feature.
Integration-readiness artifact naming the local-provider ForkPoint id, Plan 003 handoff keys, and remaining real-system gaps.
Redacted accepted HUD trace export: event count, event-stream digests, selected final scenario-evaluate boundary, and hashed tail event metadata.
Real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over task-relevant marker paths with block_network, no secrets, resource labels, and prohibited mount checks.
Replay-derived Modal Filesystem Snapshot from accepted HUD trace tool calls: replay count, skipped failed calls, snapshot id, query.py hash, grader-output hashes, and policy labels.

Orchestrated accepted-trace rerun ForkPoint from a retained Modal sandbox handle: ForkPoint id, boundary token, history hash, combined image digest, Filesystem Snapshot id, restore handoff keys, MongoDB quiescence, query hash, grader hash, policy labels, restored-sandbox negative security probes, writable/import surface inventory, and negative restore checks.

Persisted immutable ForkPoint record reloaded from the repo-native store: required interface fields, content digest, source evidence refs, snapshot identity, history hash, environment identity, and policy labels.
Image identity evidence combining Docker registry base manifest for mongo:7.0, checked-in environment source-tree digest, and the Modal build recipe used by the retained-handle ForkPoint probe.

notes: The previous COMMANDS.json start blocker is unblocked in this PR under a user-approved narrow ownership exception.

Plan 002 completion accepts the orchestrated retained-handle accepted-trace rerun as the canonical branch-ready ForkPoint for later plans. It is explicitly not claimed to be the already-finished historical sandbox instance; provider access to that instance remains unavailable.
Post-audit fix: source digest coverage now includes reference_solution.sh, which is copied into the Modal task assets. Live evidence has been regenerated under the corrected combined image digest.
Post-audit fix: capture_forkpoint now returns the sealed store-verified record instead of the pre-digest in-memory record.

Post-Plan-003 restore inspection fix: ForkPoint capture now uses the checked-in Dockerfile.hud image, writes query.py without heredoc indentation, mirrors /protected data required by init_data.py, starts MongoDB under an explicit sleep sandbox command, and cleanly shuts MongoDB down before filesystem snapshot.
Full adversarial branch isolation remains Plan 003-owned; Plan 002 records capture/restore security inventory and negative probes sufficient to hand off a branch-ready Filesystem ForkPoint.
